Headline: 63rd-bound Green Line Service Delayed near Harlem/Lake
ShortDescription: 63rd-boundGreen Line trains are standing at Harlem/Lake due to signal problems. Crews working to restore service.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
63rd-bound Green Line trains are standing at Harlem/Lake due to signal problems.

At this time, also consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes, or using buses to other rail lines.

Personnel are working to restore service. Allow extra travel time.
